title: Welcome to PRISM Sense
text: This quick tour introduces the key areas of your course viewer. Navigate your course content and get AI-powered help — all in one place.

title: Content Navigator
text: Browse your course sections here. Select any item to view the slides or video lecture your teacher has published.

title: Filter by Section
text: Use this dropdown to jump to a specific course section and view only the content that belongs to it.

title: Content Viewer
text: Your selected lecture content is displayed here. Watch videos, flip through slides, or open the AI chat for help understanding the material.
